textRuns.value: Marri Laxman Reddy Institute of Technology and Management (MLRITM), Hyderabad, stands tall as one of the most reputed autonomous engineering institutions in Telangana, driven by a commitment to innovation, excellence, and holistic student development. Established in 2009, the institute is approved by AICTE, recognized by the Government of Telangana, and permanently affiliated to JNTU Hyderabad, with NAAC ‘A’ Grade and NBA accreditation for all eligible programs. Recognized as a Scientific and Industrial Research Organization (SIRO) by the DSIR, MLRITM integrates strong academics, research, and entrepreneurship to nurture globally competent engineers and leaders.

With a vibrant community of 5,298 students guided by 289 faculty members, including 112 Ph.D. holders (40%), MLRITM ensures a healthy student–faculty ratio and personalized mentoring. Its world-class infrastructure, modern laboratories, innovation hubs, and research centres create an environment that inspires creativity, collaboration, and discovery.
